name: Coatzacoalcos I
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Coatzacoalcos I
sources: CIIT; Gobierno del Estado de Veracruz; ASIPONA Coatzacoalcos; Proyectos México. https://www.proyectosmexico.gob.mx
notes: Atlantic terminus of Corredor Interoceánico. Includes Coatzacoalcos port modernization. Absorbed from FDI record id=99. Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: Coatzacoalcos II
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Coatzacoalcos II
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit
notes: Second Coatzacoalcos polo within CIIT corridor. Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: Texistepec
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Texistepec
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit/articulos/polos-de-desarrollo-para-el-bienestar-podebis
notes: Operated by Profharmax and Transportadora Comexsa. Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: San Juan Evangelista
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar San Juan Evangelista
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit
notes: Operated by Grupo Constructor URCEDIC. Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: Matías Romero (Donají)
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Matías Romero (Donají)
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit
notes: Also known as Donají park. Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: Ixtaltepec (Chivela)
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Ixtaltepec (Chivela)
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit
notes: MARZAL aluminum recycling plant located here. Also known as Chivela park. Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: San Blas Atempa
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar San Blas Atempa
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit
notes: Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: Santa María Mixtequilla
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Santa María Mixtequilla
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit
notes: Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: Ciudad Ixtepec
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Ciudad Ixtepec
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit
notes: Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: Salina Cruz
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Salina Cruz
sources: CIIT; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit; Mota Engil (operator)
notes: Pacific terminus of Corredor Interoceánico. Port modernization included. Operated by Mota Engil consortium. Category 'En marcha' (Concessions Awarded): bidding completed and concession operator selected, but physical development is minimal as of early 2026.

name: Teapa
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Teapa
sources: CIIT; Gobierno del Estado de Tabasco; Presidencia de la República. Proyectos México. https://www.proyectosmexico.gob.mx
notes: Previously listed as Tabasco CIIT Industrial Zone (Paraíso). Corrected to Teapa per official planmexico.gob.mx/polos listing (#11). Absorbed from FDI record id=92. Rail modernization planned. Category 'En proceso' (In Procurement): as of May 2025, still in land-transfer (donación) process — bidding not yet launched.

name: Tapachula I y II
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Tapachula I y II
sources: CIIT; Gobierno del Estado de Chiapas; Gobierno de México. https://www.gob.mx/ciit
notes: Near Puerto Chiapas. Official PODECOBI presentation (2025-05-22) lists as 'Tapachula I y II', indicating two sub-zones. Former ZEE Puerto Chiapas site. Category 'En proceso' (In Procurement): Tapachula I bidding formally opened June 11, 2025 (Real Estate Market, 2025-06-11).

name: Seybaplaya
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Seybaplaya
sources: Proyectos Mexico. 2025. "PODECOBI Seybaplaya I, Campeche." https://www.proyectosmexico.gob.mx/proyecto_inversion/1001-podecobi-seybaplaya-i-campeche/
notes: American Cotton Division FX plant inaugurated, creating 1,200+ jobs

name: Ciudad Juárez
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Ciudad Juárez
sources: Chihuahua gov. 2025. "Ciudad Juarez se incorpora al Plan Mexico como polo de desarrollo economico." https://chihuahua.gob.mx/prensa/ciudad-juarez-se-incorpora-al-plan-mexico-como-polo-de-desarrollo-economico; Diario MX. 2026. https://diario.mx/juarez/2026/mar/23/invertiran-300-mdp-para-urbanizar-polo-de-desarrollo-1110907.html
notes: Official name: PODECOBI San Jeronimo. Sectors: electromobility, semiconductors, medical devices, battery plants, secondary mining

name: Durango
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Durango
sources: Canaintex. 2025. "Acuerdo por el que se emite la Declaratoria del PODECOBI Centro Logistico e Industrial de Durango." https://canaintex.org.mx/acuerdo-por-el-que-se-emite-la-declaratoria-del-polo-de-desarrollo-economico-para-el-bienestar-centro-logistico-e-industrial-de-durango-durango/
notes: Official name: PODECOBI Centro Logistico e Industrial de Durango (CLID). Phase 1: 300 USD, Phase 2: 700 USD

name: Nezahualcóyotl
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Nezahualcóyotl
sources: DOF. 2025. https://www.dof.gob.mx/nota_detalle.php?codigo=5764903&fecha=07/08/2025
notes: Sectors: logistics, digital economy, technology services, electronics, light industry, pharmaceuticals, medical devices

name: Celaya
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Celaya
sources: AM Celaya. 2025. "Polo desarrollo economico bienestar Celaya obras 2026." https://www.am.com.mx/celaya/2025/12/15/polo-desarrollo-economico-bienestar-celaya-obras-2026-1714372.html; AMCP. 2025. https://www.amcp.mx/acuerdo-por-el-que-se-emite-la-declaratoria-del-polo-de-desarrollo-economico-para-el-bienestar-puerta-logistica-del-bajio-guanajuato-dof-21-de-julio-2025/
notes: Official name: PODECOBI Puerta Logistica del Bajio. Grupo Azvi (Spain) as private developer; rail: Ferromex and CPKC

name: Zapotlán (AIFA)
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Zapotlán (AIFA)
sources: El Universal Hidalgo. 2026. "Iniciaran la construccion del polo del bienestar de Zapotlan." https://www.eluniversalhidalgo.com.mx/estado/iniciaran-la-construccion-del-polo-del-bienestar-de-zapotlan-preven-313-mpd/; Almomento. 2026. https://almomento.mx/van-seis-empresas-por-el-polo-del-bienestar-de-zapotlan-hidalgo/
notes: Official name: PODECOBI Reserva Zapotlan. Near AIFA (29 km) and Pachuca Airport (12 km). Six companies confirmed. Pharmaceuticals: API factory, generic medications, research center

name: San José Chiapa (Ciudad Modelo)
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar San José Chiapa (Ciudad Modelo)
sources: Proyectos Mexico. 2025. "PODECOBI Futura Capital de la Tecnologia y la Sostenibilidad, Puebla." https://www.proyectosmexico.gob.mx/proyecto_inversion/1004-podecobi-futura-capital-de-la-tecnologia-y-la-sostenibilidad-puebla/; Ambasmanos. 2026. https://www.ambasmanos.mx/municipios/estas-son-las-inversiones-con-las-que-reactivaran-san-jose-chiapa-en-2026/304110/
notes: Official name: PODECOBI Futura Capital de la Tecnologia y la Sostenibilidad. 80% of properties committed; 240 welfare housing units delivered April 11, 2026

name: Topolobampo
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Topolobampo
sources: DAFTJ. 2026. "Nuevo polo de desarrollo economico para el bienestar Topolobampo, Sinaloa." https://daftj.com/index.php/blog/nuevo-polo-de-desarrollo-economico-para-el-bienestar-topolobampo-sinaloa; Luz Noticias. 2026. https://www.luznoticias.mx/2026-02-27/sinaloa/topolobampo-se-formalizara-en-marzo-como-polo-de-desarrollo-/279811
notes: Investment and jobs figures are regional (northern Sinaloa). 14th SE-issued PODECOBI declaratoria

name: Altamira
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Altamira
sources: Stratego. 2025. "Declaran a Altamira, Tamaulipas como Polo de Desarrollo Economico." https://www.stratego-st.com/publicaciones/declaran-a-altamira-tamaulipas-como-polo-de-desarrollo-economico-para-el-bienestar/; Tamaulipas gov. 2026. https://www.tamaulipas.gob.mx/2026/02/firma-americo-convenio-con-secretario-de-economia-para-impulsar-polo-de-desarrollo-para-el-bienestar-en-altamira/
notes: Largest PODECOBI by area. Sectors: automotive, chemical, pharmaceutical, petrochemical, electrical-electronic, metal-mechanical, logistics. 6,400 MXN million for Altamira-Tampico viaduct

name: Huamantla
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Huamantla
sources: El Financiero. 2026. "Sheinbaum inaugura polo de desarrollo economico en Tlaxcala." https://www.elfinanciero.com.mx/nacional/2026/04/13/sheinbaum-inaugura-polo-de-desarrollo-economico-en-tlaxcala-con-inversion-de-500-mdd/; La Jornada. 2026. https://www.jornada.com.mx/noticia/2026/04/13/politica/inaugura-sheinbaum-primer-polo-de-desarrollo-economico
notes: First PODECOBI inaugurated nationally (April 12-13, 2026). Seven companies committed. Tlaxcala model: infrastructure first, then companies

name: Tuxpan
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Tuxpan
sources: SIDOF. 2025. https://sidof.segob.gob.mx/notas/docFuente/5766562; Veracruz gov. 2025. "Tuxpan motor economico del Golfo." https://www.veracruz.gob.mx/2025/08/26/tuxpan-motor-economico-del-golfo-publican-declaratoria-del-polo-de-desarrollo/
notes: Sectors: logistics, agribusiness, light/specialized textiles, energy, commerce. 823 MXN million for complementary infrastructure

name: Morelia-Zinapécuaro
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Morelia-Zinapécuaro
sources: Heraldo de Mexico. 2026. "Avanza polo de bienestar de Zinapecuaro, Michoacan." https://heraldodemexico.com.mx/nacional/2026/2/6/avanza-polo-de-bienestar-de-zinapecuaro-michoacan-766700.html; Cluster Industrial. 2026. https://clusterindustrial.com.mx/polo-de-desarrollo-en-zinapecuaro-proyecta-inversion-por-2-926-mdp/
notes: Official name: PODECOBI Parque Industrial Bajio. Investors: Citelis, Grupo Herso, Artifibras, Monarca Truck, Harinera Monarcas, Grupo SIMSA, Truper

name: Chetumal
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Chetumal
sources: QRoo SEDE. 2026. "Es una realidad el PODECOBI de Chetumal." https://sede.qroo.gob.mx/es-una-realidad-el-polo-de-desarrollo-economico-para-el-bienestar-de-chetumal-se-publica-en-dof/
notes: Sectors: aeronautics (Zenith Aeronautica - aircraft maintenance/repair), cargo services. Technical Evaluation Committee installed 2026

name: Tula
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Tula
sources: Milenio. 2025. "Publican decreto que crea polo bienestar region Tula." https://www.milenio.com/politica/publican-decreto-crea-polo-bienestar-region-tula; La Jornada Hidalgo. 2025. https://lajornadahidalgo.com/publican-declaratoria-de-parque-hidalgo-como-polo-de-bienestar/
notes: Official name: Polo de Desarrollo de Economia Circular para el Bienestar, Parque Hidalgo. Circular economy polo under SEMARNAT. Land owned by Pemex. 96% industrial, 2% research, 2% commercial

name: Hermosillo
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Hermosillo
sources: DOF. 2025. https://www.dof.gob.mx/nota_detalle.php?codigo=5766564&fecha=26/08/2025; Tribuna. 2026. "Foxconn visitara Hermosillo para evaluar polo del bienestar." https://tribuna.com.mx/sonora/2026/04/16/foxconn-visitara-hermosillo-para-evaluar-polo-del-bienestar-confirma-marcelo-ebrard_506790/
notes: Foxconn executives visiting April 27-29, 2026. Sectors: agribusiness, automotive, electromobility, semiconductors, energy, logistics. Northern Economic Corridor

name: ZM Mérida
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar ZM Mérida
sources: Gobierno del Estado de Yucatán; La Silla Rota (2025-12-15). https://lasillarota.com
notes: Under evaluation. ZM Mérida encompasses the metropolitan zone including Progreso port area. Former ZEE Progreso site. Reclassified from separate Mérida/Progreso entries per official PPT_MEC PODECOBI (2025-05-22).

name: Lázaro Cárdenas
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Lázaro Cárdenas
municipality: La Unión de Isidoro Montes de Oca
sources: La Silla Rota (2025-12-15). https://lasillarota.com
notes: Under evaluation. Former ZEE site. Located on Michoacán-Guerrero border near major Pacific port.

name: Zona Carbonífera
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Zona Carbonífera
sources: La Silla Rota (2025-12-15). https://lasillarota.com
notes: Under evaluation. Coal mining region transitioning to new economic activities.

name: Polo de Economia Circular para el Bienestar Puebla
name_official: Polo de Desarrollo para el Bienestar Polo de Economia Circular para el Bienestar Puebla
legal_basis: DOF 02/03/2026 - Declaratoria del Polo de Desarrollo de Economia Circular para el Bienestar Puebla (SEMARNAT)
sources: La Jornada. 2026. "Semarnat declara superficie de 40 hectareas en Puebla como Polo de Desarrollo de Economia Circular." https://www.jornada.com.mx/noticia/2026/03/02/sociedad/semarnat-declara-superficie-de-40-hectareas-en-puebla-como-polo-de-desarrollo-de-economia-circular; Proceso. 2026. https://www.proceso.com.mx/nacional/2026/3/3/pese-rechazo-de-pobladores-gobierno-federal-decreta-polo-de-economia-circular-en-san-jose-chiapa-369547.html
notes: DISTINCT from polo #19. Different legal basis (SEMARNAT vs SE), different area (40 ha vs 275 ha), different sector focus. Declared despite opposition from local residents.
